offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, overdue invoices cause cash flow gaps. We provide a tracking tool instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in tracking overdue client billing invoices.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities where accounting firms seek advice
Indie Hackers posts discussing similar challenges
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Participate in community forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users manually enter overdue invoices and generate reports for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing invoice data
Offer one-click export for simple reports
